description: A self-employed consultant needs to calculate their quarterly estimated tax payment.

nodes.task_description: Project the consultant's total annual self-employment income and expenses.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a projection of annual net profit.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the total projected income and self-employment tax for the year.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent estimates the total tax liability.

nodes.task_description: Divide the total estimated tax by four and prepare a payment voucher for the current quarter.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent calculates the required quarterly payment and prepares Form 1040-ES.
